description: Fixes a typo in the MSBuild variable (`AsemblyName` → `AssemblyName`) that caused the configuration schema generator's intermediate response file to be unnamed, preventing per-project identification and risking cross-project file collisions in shared output paths. Also adds a `ConfigurationSchemaGeneratorEnabled` MSBuild property so integration projects can opt out of schema generation.
name: ConfigurationSchemaGenerator filename fix and opt-out support
